display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts visit the North Yorkshire town of Scarborough, where finds include a carved tribute to a Spitfire pilot killed in action.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents from Farnborough, Hampshire. Items include early designs for a flying machine and a letter written in the First World War trenches.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team break with tradition and actually follow Dave Mathewson's advice on what to restore - he points to a 1992 Vauxhall Nova Merit Plus.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team restore a 1988 Golf GTI Convertible - an iconic hot hatch - along with a wooden launch boat and a catch-up with a Mk1 Austin Mini.

programme.title: The Men and the Machines That Beat Hitler
programme.desc: Mark Urban continues the story of men from the Fifth Royal Tank Regiment. This moving final episode covers D-Day, the battle for Normandy and eventual victory in Germany.

programme.title: D-Day To Berlin
programme.desc: Anglo-American relations toward the end of 1944 began to sour as the Allies fought in the conference chamber for the right to direct the final assault on Germany.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The experts visit the North Yorkshire town of Scarborough, where finds include a carved tribute to a Spitfire pilot killed in action.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough journeys into the hidden world of forests, from the temperate rainforests of Canada, to the teak forests of India.

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: After King Harold's brother Tostig attacks the south coast, another enemy strikes when a vast Viking force lands in the north. Harold rushes to fight for his kingdom - and his life.

programme.title: Empire with Michael Portillo
programme.desc: Michael travels to India to uncover how the British East India Company - the world's first multinational corporation - raised a private army to create an empire.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team break with tradition and actually follow Dave Mathewson's advice on what to restore - he points to a 1992 Vauxhall Nova Merit Plus.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team restore a 1988 Golf GTI Convertible - an iconic hot hatch - along with a wooden launch boat and a catch-up with a Mk1 Austin Mini.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek gives the once-over to a Royale Formula Ford race car, and Paul is on a marathon trip to pick up a 1953 MGYB, a Moggy Van, and an '80s Yamaha 250RD motorbike.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon and Henry head to Wiltshire. Henry is feeling happy because they're going to an old WWII airfield. Simon decides to restore a 1970's caravan while Henry opts for a boat.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on train journeys through Edwardian Britain, exploring the grand estates of Norfolk and a bivouac on Brownsea Island on the way.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Letchworth Garden City to Herne Hill: Michael Portillo explores Edwardian utopia in Letchworth, where he meets a fourth generation citizen who introduces him to the town's community spirit.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a beachside resort with ties to the Russian mafia, a windswept base hiding lifesaving technology, and a site in Iowa plagued by its past.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a bizarre block in Taiwan resembling a giant speaker, a pioneering venture in Alaska, and an alpine village that masks a military beast.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is on the road to pick up a funky little Nissan Figaro and a sublime Ferrari 250 GT tribute car, and Paul gets to try out his spanking new Scania T Cab.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek checks out an abandoned 1985 Renault 4 and an MGB Roadster, and Jack heads to Rotherham to pick up a pair of rare Bond Bugs.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Hitler's Island Madness: Uncovering hidden structures built by the Nazis. The first edition focuses on Guernsey, which Hitler occupied and fortified over the course of five years.

programme.title: D-Day To Berlin
programme.desc: The last few months of the war involved final battles in Germany, the assault on Berlin, Hitler's death, and the emergence of a new dictator: Soviet leader Joseph Stalin.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team arrives at the National Maritime Museum Cornwall in Falmouth, where objects include a diamond and gold ring with a grim history.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A second visit to the National Maritime Museum Cornwall. Items include early medical instruments.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A super-rare Renault Clio Williams 2 in F1 blue with contrasting gold alloys turns Dave Mathewson an interesting shade of green.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team snap up a slightly saggy Seventies Saab 96 - despite a stunning restoration, could it result in a record financial loss when it goes to auction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Hitler's Island Madness: Uncovering hidden structures built by the Nazis. The first edition focuses on Guernsey, which Hitler occupied and fortified over the course of five years.

programme.title: D-Day To Berlin
programme.desc: The last few months of the war involved final battles in Germany, the assault on Berlin, Hitler's death, and the emergence of a new dictator: Soviet leader Joseph Stalin.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team arrives at the National Maritime Museum Cornwall in Falmouth, where objects include a diamond and gold ring with a grim history.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals the extraordinary ways in which animals battle to survive in a world of extremes, from mountain summits to deserts, polar tundra to caves.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Jack's baby Max makes his podium debut with Great Grandad Derek. Paul visits a former stock car racer and finds a Pinto pimped Anglia and a Talbot Sunbeam Lotus.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek acquires a collection of pre and post war classics, including a Vincent Rapide, a 1928 Alvis, a Ford Pilot and an Indian Scout with sidecar.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A super-rare Renault Clio Williams 2 in F1 blue with contrasting gold alloys turns Dave Mathewson an interesting shade of green.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team snap up a slightly saggy Seventies Saab 96 - despite a stunning restoration, could it result in a record financial loss when it goes to auction.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The Cook, The Chief, The Cop and His Lover: Charlie and Rex sniff out the suspects when the Chief Superintendent of the St. John's Police Department dies at a popular restaurant.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie and Al suspect that a tabloid cameraman's death during a convenience-store robbery may be more than just a random act of violence.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A horse trekking expedition is cut short when Jack discovers the dead body of a rider in the most unexpected of places - the police station itself.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson is Canada's Sherlock Holmes in the mystery set in the 1900s. Murdoch meets magnificent men in their flying machines when a crash kills a man.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The cult mystery set in 1900s Canada. When a soldier is slain with a sword, Murdoch's prime suspect is a hungover young man named Churchill.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The CBI investigates the murder of a diamond cutter who was disembowelled with his own tools, while Patrick meets a girl who claims to be his daughter Charlotte.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The Cook, The Chief, The Cop and His Lover: Charlie and Rex sniff out the suspects when the Chief Superintendent of the St. John's Police Department dies at a popular restaurant.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate death threats made against a soap star about to make a return.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: To help a former client whose life was destroyed by identity theft, Angie and Shade go undercover in the seemingly glossy world of speed dating to find a con artist.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A horse trekking expedition is cut short when Jack discovers the dead body of a rider in the most unexpected of places - the police station itself.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The crime drama marks its 100th episode as the team celebrates the Commissioner's 50 years in the job - only for an assassin to bring the party to a swift end.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A celebrity florist brings a dash of glamour to Kembleford, but also gains Father Brown's interest after the suspicious death of an angry neighbour.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: To help a former client whose life was destroyed by identity theft, Angie and Shade go undercover in the seemingly glossy world of speed dating to find a con artist.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Flambeau enlists Father Brown's help to steal the pope's coronation gift to the Queen of England.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A horse trekking expedition is cut short when Jack discovers the dead body of a rider in the most unexpected of places - the police station itself.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson is Canada's Sherlock Holmes in the mystery set in the 1900s. Murdoch meets magnificent men in their flying machines when a crash kills a man.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: When Margaret finds herself on the verge of losing a prominent case, Todd seeks help from an unlikely source: his imprisoned ex-girlfriend, Veronica.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The cult Canadian 1900s crime drama. Murdoch sets up a new piece of technology called a film camera on a street in order to capture a killer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Canadian 1900s crime drama. When Murdoch pursues a gang of armed robbers, his prime suspect is a man claiming to be Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: The Fairest Show Means Most Deceit: A workplace compensation claim isn't as straightforward as it seems. Frank's sceptical when a long-lost relative finds him.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick investigates when a bank employee is murdered during a heist, and comes to the conclusion that the robbers were working with an inside man.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex try to take down a car theft ring after one of the team is seriously injured trying to stop a theft in progress.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: When the son of a prominent scientist is kidnapped, Major Crimes determines that it was not a crime of opportunity - but a calculated scheme for revenge.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A man confesses to murdering his boss despite being unable to remember what happened, but Neville is convinced that things are not as simple as they seem.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The cult Canadian 1900s crime drama. Murdoch sets up a new piece of technology called a film camera on a street in order to capture a killer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Canadian 1900s crime drama. When Murdoch pursues a gang of armed robbers, his prime suspect is a man claiming to be Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick investigates when a bank employee is murdered during a heist, and comes to the conclusion that the robbers were working with an inside man.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex try to take down a car theft ring after one of the team is seriously injured trying to stop a theft in progress.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: The Fairest Show Means Most Deceit: A workplace compensation claim isn't as straightforward as it seems. Frank's sceptical when a long-lost relative finds him.

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: A simple surveillance case at a karaoke bar in Little Korea escalates to full danger, forcing Shade and Angie to call in familiar reinforcements for help.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A man confesses to murdering his boss despite being unable to remember what happened, but Neville is convinced that things are not as simple as they seem.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: Sabrina is cleared for duty, but struggles with the repercussions of her actions as she begins in a new case: a junior hockey team owner found shot after a game.

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: The student becomes the master when an escaped serial killer from the Pit decides to adopt another inmate's style of killing as a way of paying homage to them.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
programme.desc: Join us for coverage of the Final of the FIFA World Cup 2026 from the New York New Jersey Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey. Teams to be confirmed.

programme.title: Endangered Species Aotearoa
programme.desc: Nic and Pax encounter challenges traversing the treacherous bog environment in search for a rare and cryptic bird.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Answer Run
programme.desc: Comedian Jason Manford hosts an exciting, fast-paced quiz show, where three couples face a series of 50/50 questions which hurtle The Answer Run down towards them.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Step Dave
programme.desc: Dave suspects that Cara is embarrassed of their age difference. Julia is determined to find out what the catch is with Cara's new mystery man. S1 E2

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: A bush walk and suspect playing possum for Delta Squad. Sophie sniffs out a biosecurity threat at the airport. DOC’s search for skinks turns full investigation after an unexpected find. S15 E6

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: How does a scientist catch the wind? Fast motorbikes spell disaster for a slow learner. A chronic under-taker gets caught after multiple phone complaints. S10 E6

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The team confronts an unexpected final hurdle they need to overcome to bring Senior to justice for his role in the Wellbrexa cover-up. S2 E15

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage ruins everything.

programme.title: Down For Love
programme.desc: Braydon & Leisel are packing for an adventure of a lifetime, Jisiah gets a date with his dream girl, and country girl Stevi heads to the big smoke of Hamilton.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Sam and Selina want to build a large, self-sufficient family home for themselves and their three sons on the estate just outside Canberra, which has been in the family for six generations.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Answer Run
programme.desc: Comedian Jason Manford hosts an exciting, fast-paced quiz show, where three couples face a series of 50/50 questions which hurtle The Answer Run down towards them.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway are heading to a stunning station you won't find on modern-day tube maps - Dover Street, now known as Green Park.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway embark on a night-time track walk to the abandoned station of British Museum.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway head to London's iconic Camden Town station - a labyrinthine junction on the Northern Line.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway begin their journey at South Kensington, home of Victoria and Albert Museum, the Science Museum and the Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway are heading to a stunning station you won't find on modern-day tube maps - Dover Street, now known as Green Park.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway embark on a night-time track walk to the abandoned station of British Museum.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front, along with Mum and Dad, are in for a long night when they get held up by fugitive Speed and his gun-toting comrade MacTaggart.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front hire a private detective to prove Speed's innocence - but haven't they met them somewhere before.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie is determined to save the Tooting he loves, but the stakes are high and he is soon forced to go on the run.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Chucklesome sequel to The Likely Lads. After five years apart, the old pals meet by chance. Terry returns to civilian life, while marriage looms for Bob.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Brilliant 'buddy sitcom' from the early 1970s. Terry's return has been less than triumphant - his parents are away, it's cold and there's no food in the house.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front, along with Mum and Dad, are in for a long night when they get held up by fugitive Speed and his gun-toting comrade MacTaggart.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: The Tooting Popular Front hire a private detective to prove Speed's innocence - but haven't they met them somewhere before.

programme.desc: Wolfie is determined to save the Tooting he loves, but the stakes are high and he is soon forced to go on the run.

programme.desc: Chucklesome sequel to The Likely Lads. After five years apart, the old pals meet by chance. Terry returns to civilian life, while marriage looms for Bob.

programme.desc: Chucklesome sequel to The Likely Lads. After five years apart, the old pals meet by chance. Terry returns to civilian life, while marriage looms for Bob.

programme.desc: Brilliant 'buddy sitcom' from the early 1970s. Terry's return has been less than triumphant - his parents are away, it's cold and there's no food in the house.

programme.desc: Chucklesome sequel to The Likely Lads. After five years apart, the old pals meet by chance. Terry returns to civilian life, while marriage looms for Bob.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Brilliant 'buddy sitcom' from the early 1970s. Terry's return has been less than triumphant - his parents are away, it's cold and there's no food in the house.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough looks at some amazing quirks of evolution. This time, we focus on the giraffe's neck and the chameleon's tongue.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: The South Central crews help a boy who has dislocated his knee during a school rugby match and a man suffering with agonising stomach pains after eating a bacon sandwich.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Crews help a family whose car has crashed into a ditch, a woman with fast and erratic breathing, and a partially paralysed woman who's suffered a head injury in her garden.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Crews treat a boy hit by a car outside school, a pensioner with a huge lump on his head and a woman with suspected sepsis.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: The medics help a man bleeding profusely, another who is in agony after falling and a woman with a cripplingly painful bowel condition.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: The South Central crews help a boy who has dislocated his knee during a school rugby match and a man suffering with agonising stomach pains after eating a bacon sandwich.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Crews help a family whose car has crashed into a ditch, a woman with fast and erratic breathing, and a partially paralysed woman who's suffered a head injury in her garden.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: Crews treat a boy hit by a car outside school, a pensioner with a huge lump on his head and a woman with suspected sepsis.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance: Coast and Country
programme.desc: The medics help a man bleeding profusely, another who is in agony after falling and a woman with a cripplingly painful bowel condition.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: Brookland's Concorde 'Delta Golf' has a makeover, in time for a visit from Concorde royalty.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A volunteer is tasked with restoring a legendary Le Mans racer. A decommissioned bomb proves difficult, and can the experts revive the dormant engines of a transatlantic flyer.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: Racing driver Billy Monger gives a fellow double amputee a driving lesson and a fire engine gets pumping for the first time in years.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: The legendary Railton Napier has a service and some treasure is found in the museum tower whilst a 100-year-old push bike gets a wooden wheel built.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A Barnes Wallis catapult is fixed by volunteers, but can they bounce bombs on water like the dam busters? A Triumph car is put through its paces in a road test.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: Brookland's Concorde 'Delta Golf' has a makeover, in time for a visit from Concorde royalty.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs are brought in to solve the case of a recently murdered student whose death photo ends up trending on the Internet. S12 E17

programme.title: Family Massacre
programme.desc: Series Premiere: A family of four is found dead inside a partially burned Indiana home.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: The court urges Patty to show progress in the Tobin case or risk removal. Meanwhile, Ellen grows suspicious about a recent death and Tom faces the weight of personal financial loss. S3 E6

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy finds herself caught in the middle of a conflict between Cheyenne and her ex-convict mother, Brandi. S3 E11

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Buzz's Epic Little Missions
programme.desc: Buzz take us on a kayaking adventure, investigates what’s making a mysterious sound, and builds an epic obstacle course with the help of his dog Zion; but can he make it over the jump?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The team is back and just as courageous, adventurous, humorous & obsessed with cases like before. They are joined by celebrities in their adventures and ghost hunts and in search of puzzles to solve.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The superheroes Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy love saving the world. But after they decide to stop fighting crime, things do not go as planned.

programme.title: Lu And The Bally Bunch
programme.desc: Navigating preschool life can be tricky! Lu the affectionate ladybird is used to getting her own way - but now, alongside her new classmates, she must learn what it means to be a good friend.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: With Curtis Stone back in the kitchen, and the MasterChef contestants are challenged with cooking a dish that heroes pork to save their place in the competition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage ruins everything.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Eden fears a great loss. Mackenzie’s patience wears thin. David struggles to join the dots.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything.

programme.title: Good Chef, Bad Chef
programme.desc: Mike, Jacq, Tim and Jo create stunning dishes, balancing bold flavours and wholesome ingredients. Every meal is a delight-what will you try first?

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Our Guides jet into buzzing Hong Kong, to see the sights and savour the city's epic food scene. They'll learn how to lion dance, compete in dragon boat racing, and learn Tai Chi.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge poses for a calendar for charity, but she is soon the talk of the town after she reveals a little too much during her photo shoot. S21 E5

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy doesn't have time to work on super-asymmetry, Sheldon goes to great lengths to ensure she's available - even it if means accidentally sabotaging her career in the process! S12 E5

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Harper is torn. Dana sets Levi a friendly challenge. Sonny stoops to a new low. Remi babysits Archie for the first time.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Vili takes the blame.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: It's Aussie Classics Week, there's nothing Aussies love more than a great comeback story. Today, the previously eliminated contestants return for a chance to earn back their place.

programme.title: Fear Factor: 48 Hours of Fear
programme.desc: Five sleep-deprived contestants push through another 24 hours of tarantulas, needles, electrocution and a disgusting sushi showdown that pushes one contestant over the edge.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Potential love interests are introduced by gradually revealing their naked bodies... Then the contestants must choose a partner based on their first impressions.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: It's the grand final, which features peas, teas and absent keys! Who will go home with Greg Davies' massive face? Starring New Zealand's very own Rose Matafeo! S9 E10

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When the CSI team is called in to investigate a robbery-homicide at an 'Alice in Wonderland' themed wedding, they have little to work with to find a killer. S12 E18

programme.title: Family Massacre
programme.desc: An elderly couple and their daughter are found beaten and stabbed in their home in central Texas.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Patty sends Tom out of the country to follow the money trail of the Tobin fraud; Ellen must choose between Patty and her new boss; Leonard Winston leaves the city under mysterious circumstances. S3 E7

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: When gamers invade Cloud 9 for the release of a hot new video game, Jonah tries to help Amy secure herself a copy of the game, which takes them on an unexpected adventure. S3 E13
